content.title: Disk full — Server frozen
content.description: The server is frozen. Processes cannot write to disk. No logs are being recorded. Deployments are failing.
content.incident: Error: No space left on device. The root filesystem is at 100%.
tasks: Check available space on all filesystems
Identify the directory consuming the most space
Find the largest files or logs to remove
Verify that services are back online
hints: find /var/log -name '*.log' -size +100M to find large log files

feedback.success: Space freed. Server operational. Filesystem at 45%.
feedback.partial: Space freed but below the minimum threshold.
feedback.fail: Disk still full. Look for larger files.

content.success_message: INCIDENT RESOLVED — 2.3GB freed — Server operational — +80 XP
